goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'west' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'british' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'price range'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'restaurant' by '20:00'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the west and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve british food
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the same area as the restaurant
The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
Make sure you get address and price range
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the restaurant by 20:00
Make sure you get contact number and car type
